emails.subject: Dabhol
emails.body: Steve, Please forgive the delay. I was having trouble with my PC again (we have a replacement in the works). We are discretely investigating this group a bit more, but the general conclusion is that they may be a front for one of the opposition groups. We are preparing counter arguments for the general public, but do not see much value in opening a dialogue with this "group." We always have had opposition and we can expect that socialists etc. (some groups have boasted that they will storm the DPC fences on March 1) will begin to rally using us as a scapegoat for Maharashtra's financial difficulties. At present, we are getting balanced press and I fear that any explanation/outreach to the most vitriolic opposition will be used against us. I am available to discuss this at your convenience. John Forwarded by John Ambler/ENRON_DEVELOPMENT on 02/19/2001 11:55 PM Maureen McVicker@ENRON 02/16/2001 03:30 PM
